title: The People's Petition
description: Your reputation has traveled ahead of you. Villagers gather with a petition, believing that someone as admired as you can force a cruel magistrate to listen.

options.title: Champion Their Cause
options.description: Put your reputation at risk for people with no influence of their own.

options.title: Sell Your Endorsement
options.description: The magistrate will pay well for your public support.

options.title: Offer Advice
options.description: Preserve your influence while teaching them to organize without you.
